works.title: Circle of Emotions
works.subtitle: A multidisciplinary journey into the human inner side, combining live music, surround electronics, video art, visual art, and audience participation.
works.description: The performance is site specific and can be tailored for the venue

credits.Performers: Naama Lavee / Jason Butler / Andy Ingamells

works.title: Machina Craft
works.subtitle: An installation of live electronic improvisation within a workshop for instrument repair.
works.description: Sonata in iii movements for Electronics, Craftsman and his Tools

works.title: Marionette
works.subtitle: A theatrical-circus-musical performance
works.description: A Marionette who escapes her home in search of her name and her humanity

credits.Collaborators:
Text and theatrical direction - Dalit Milshtein
Costumes - Michal Laor / Light design - Judy Kupferman
